transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
I just got done filming for the program "Live Show Today"
I ate about 15 servings of pork belly
Let's get it
[Sushi Nokando (Nowon)]
I'll sit here away from everyone
[Conveyor belt sushi]
1,790 Won per plate for the combination selection (~$1.63 USD)
It's passing by
Cheese beef
This is shrimp and egg
Yum
Flounder
Is it not?
Salmon
Tasty

Tuna
What is this?
I'm not sure what it is Swordfish?
I need to take that!
It's the same thing
That was the best
Crab meat
I better take that
Conch
[Conveyor belt sushi=eating everything in sight]
[Watch out for wasabi]
That was a wasabi bomb
This one tasted really good Shrimp and egg
This is not squid It's cuttlefish
Delicious
Steak tartare

[Eyebrows of truth]
This one's the bests
That's so good, should I ask for more?
2 swordfish, 1 eel with roe
1 fish belly
This is the fish belly
Looks good I like this one
Swordfish I like this one too
Almost as good as tuna
So good
Eel with fish roe
[2 seconds per plate]
Excuse me, can I order?
Flounder fin, swordfish,
Kuruma shrimp, and abalone please
Flounder fin sushi

This abalone for 1,790 Won
Do you have chuck flap tail?
4 please
Steak tartare is mine
Thank you
Chuck flap
This is our last swordfish
[Out of Stock!]
2 tuna tataki
3 flounder fins
You eat a lot
Salmon
[Digesting]
[Round 2 start]
3 fins
Come to me

Thank you
Aged kimchi tastes really good
The only reason I can eat 100 plates of sushi after eating pork belly
is because most of these had only 1 piece on it
[Yeah, okay..]
This is on the house
It's cheese
Do the cheese pull
Thank you
I just tasted it and it's really good
What was it?
It's cheese scallop and cheese shrimp
I really like this one
It's even better than before
Wait, what?
What just happened?

I was like where's my sushi?
Should we count the plates?
[Chat: She ate the plate too] No I didn't!
[A total of 102 plates]
[182,260 Won (~$165 USD)
Where's the exit?
Is it here? No..
Where's the exit?
Use the elevator Oh, right!
